name: research-history
_note: tools.research-history reads the caller's web-research search history from globalThis._concordSTATE.toolsLens.searchHistory, keyed by ctx.actor.userId. STATE-backed, per-user, no network — {} returns ok:true with an empty history (NEVER no_db). Fail-CLOSED: a poisoned numeric limit (NaN/Infinity/1e308/negative) returns ok:false invalid_limit BEFORE clamping.
